tools.name: get_model_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific LLM/VLM model: pricing, benchmarks, capabilities, and ready-to-use API code example. Returns structured Markdown (~300 tokens).

tools.name: list_top_models
tools.description: List top-ranked LLM/VLM models for a category. Categories: coding, math, vision, general, cost-effective, open-source, speed, context-window, reasoning. Returns a compact Markdown table (~250 tokens).

tools.name: compare_models
tools.description: Compare 2-5 LLM/VLM models side-by-side: pricing, benchmarks, capabilities. Returns a compact Markdown comparison table (~400 tokens).

tools.name: recommend_model
tools.description: Get personalized model recommendations based on use case, budget, and requirements. Returns top 3 picks with reasoning (~350 tokens).
